name: @open-cowork/gateway
description: Headless Open Cowork channel gateway daemon

scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/cloud-client build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-channel build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-telegram build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-slack build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-email build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-webhook build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-cli build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-discord build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-whatsapp build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-signal build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-testing build && tsc
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/cloud-client build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-channel build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-telegram build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-slack build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-email build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-webhook build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-cli build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-discord build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-whatsapp build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-signal build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-testing build && tsc --noEmit
